process.description: Early testing of video calling revealed Agora.io authentication requirements, preventing late-stage integration issues
Building core services before UI components creates solid foundation for complex features

efficiency.description: Breaking complex features into discrete phases enables better progress tracking and user approval

patterns.description: Following user's specific implementation plan yields better results than generic approaches

blockers.description: New dependencies can impact development server configuration, requiring flexible debugging approaches

process_improvements.description: Test authentication requirements early in integration process to avoid late-stage blockers

efficiency_improvements.description: Continue using phase-based implementation for complex features to maintain clear progress tracking

risk_mitigations.description: Maintain alternative development approaches when new dependencies impact primary dev server
